title: Aiko's Animal Sound Walk
synopsis: Baby Aiko takes a delightful walk through her neighborhood, discovering different animals and the special sounds they make. From barking dogs to chirping birds, each page introduces a new animal friend with repetitive, soothing text perfect for young listeners.

illustration.description: A cheerful Japanese-American toddler girl with short black hair wearing a soft yellow dress and tiny sneakers takes her first steps on a sidewalk. Her chubby arms are outstretched for balance, and she has a big smile. The background shows a peaceful residential street with pastel-colored houses and blooming cherry trees.
illustration.alt: Aiko taking steps on a sidewalk

illustration.description: Aiko stands next to a friendly golden retriever sitting on green grass. The dog's mouth is open in a happy bark, tongue hanging out. Aiko claps her hands with delight, her eyes wide and sparkling. Soft watercolor style with warm yellows and greens, simple fence in the background.
illustration.alt: Aiko with a barking golden dog

illustration.description: A fluffy orange tabby cat sits on a low garden wall while Aiko reaches up to gently pet it. The cat's mouth is open in a meow, whiskers prominent. Aiko giggles with pure joy. Soft peachy and orange tones dominate, with lavender flowers in the background garden.
illustration.alt: Aiko petting an orange meowing cat

illustration.description: Aiko looks up at a bright blue bird perched on a low tree branch. The bird has its beak open, singing. Aiko points upward with wonder, her mouth forming a little 'o' of amazement. Light blue sky background with soft green leaves, dappled sunlight creating gentle shadows.
illustration.alt: Aiko pointing at a tweeting blue bird

illustration.description: At a small pond, Aiko crouches down watching a yellow duckling paddle in the water. The duckling's beak is open in a quack, creating small ripples. Aiko's reflection shimmers in the water. Soft blues and yellows, with cattails and lily pads around the pond's edge.
illustration.alt: Aiko watching a quacking duckling in pond

illustration.description: Aiko sits in a flower garden watching a chubby bumblebee hover near purple flowers. The bee is cartoonishly large and friendly with visible wings in motion. Aiko sits cross-legged, hands in her lap, watching with fascination. Bright purple and yellow flowers surround them in soft watercolor strokes.
illustration.alt: Aiko watching a buzzing bee in flowers

illustration.description: A bright green frog sits on a lily pad in a shallow stream while Aiko kneels on the grassy bank. The frog's throat is puffed out mid-croak. Aiko leans forward curiously, her dark eyes bright with interest. Cool greens and blues create a peaceful water scene.
illustration.alt: Aiko listening to a ribbiting frog on lily pad

illustration.description: In the soft evening light, Aiko looks up at a gentle brown owl perched in an oak tree. The owl's large eyes look kindly down at her. Aiko waves goodbye with a sleepy smile. Warm golden sunset colors wash over the scene, with the first stars beginning to twinkle.
illustration.alt: Aiko waving at a hooting owl at sunset

illustration.description: Aiko sits in her cozy bedroom in soft pink pajamas, surrounded by stuffed animal versions of all the animals she met. A diverse family (Asian mother, Black father) tucks her into bed. Warm lamplight creates a golden glow, with a mobile of the sound animals hanging above her crib.
illustration.alt: Aiko saying goodnight surrounded by animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the dog make?
What does Aiko say at the end?
questions.explanation: Aiko says night-night when going to bed!
